headline: TRY pressure persists at 46.67/USD amid sustained rate hold and geopolitical energy risks.
summary: The Turkish lira has weakened 17.4% year-to-date as the CBRT maintains its hawkish stance at 37% policy rate, keeping overnight rates tight to defend currency stability amid Middle East conflict and energy price volatility. Bond yields remain elevated at 30.8% on the 10Y, reflecting inflation and funding pressures. BIST 100 is near record highs at 14,274, up 51.8% YoY, with strong M&A momentum continuing (2025: $11.8bn deal value). FX market structure remains supportive for carry trades despite macro headwinds.

items.title: CBRT Holds Policy Rate at 37% in June, Signals Tight Stance into 2026
items.summary: <cite index="1-1">CBRT maintained benchmark overnight lending rate at 37% for third straight decision in June 2026, aligned with market expectations.</cite>

items.title: USD/TRY at 46.67 as Lira Weakens 17.4% Over 12 Months
items.summary: <cite index="12-4,12-5">USD/TRY exchange rate rose to 46.6723 on July 1, 2026, up 0.06% from previous session; over 12 months lira down 17.41%.</cite>

items.title: Turkey 10Y Bond Yield at 30.83% as Inflation and Funding Pressures Persist
items.summary: <cite index="23-1">Yield on Turkey 10Y Bond rose to 30.83% on June 26, 2026, marking 0.06 percentage points increase from previous session.</cite>

items.title: BIST 100 Trades Near Records at 14,274, Up 51.8% Year-over-Year
items.summary: <cite index="39-1">Turkey's BIST 100 rose to 14,274 points on June 26, 2026, gaining 0.10% from previous session and up 51.77% compared to same time last year.</cite>

items.title: Borsa Istanbul Launches New Data Center Operations
items.summary: Borsa İstanbul announced launch of new data center on June 30, 2026, supporting market infrastructure and trading operations.

items.title: Turkish M&A Deal Value Hits 13-Year High at $11.8bn in 2025, Strongest Since 2013
items.summary: <cite index="36-13,36-15">Turkish M&A market recorded strongest performance in over a decade in 2025; total value of 162 transactions reached $11.81bn, highest annual figure recorded since 2013.</cite>

items.title: Turkish Competition Authority Amends M&A Filing Thresholds (Feb 11, 2026)
items.summary: <cite index="36-1,36-2">Turkish Competition Authority thresholds amended on Feb 11, 2026; filing triggered when total Turkish turnover exceeds TRY 3bn with at least two parties exceeding TRY 1bn separately.</cite>

items.title: Foreign Holdings in Turkish Bond Market Recover to 7.5% Amid Falling CDS
items.summary: <cite index="29-4,29-5">Foreign holdings climbed back to 7.5% after plummeting following arrest of opposition figure in March; Turkey's five-year CDS dropped to 210 basis points in early January 2026, lowest since May 2018.</cite>

items.title: CBRT Plans TRY450bn Open Market Operations Portfolio in 2026
items.summary: <cite index="25-2">CBRT aims to increase OMO portfolio to nominal TRY450bn in 2026 from current TRY262bn; signalling plans to buy additional government bonds.</cite>

items.title: Energy Transition and Tech M&A to Drive Turkish Deal Flow in 2026
items.summary: <cite index="31-19,31-20">Turkey's gaming ecosystem continues to attract international buyers; energy transition, digital transformation and regulated-sector consolidation expected to sustain deal flow in 2026.</cite>

items.title: BP-Petrol Ofisi Merger Completed; Rebranding Expected Q4 2026
items.summary: <cite index="31-2,31-3,31-4">Merger between BP Turkey and Petrol Ofisi completed in February 2026; BP Turkey dissolved and distribution license transferred; rebranding process expected completed by Q4 2026.</cite>
